message:
fix(storage): gate API token accumulation on is_api flag in sqlite aggregator

The same token rollup bug fixed in query.rs existed in the actual
AnalyticsRollupAggregator — api_tokens_total and related fields were
accumulated unconditionally regardless of is_api. Move the six API
token accumulation lines inside the is_api guard in both the hourly
and daily aggregation paths.

Also renames plan_api_rollup_requires_api_data_source test to
api_rollups_require_api_data_source and expands assertions to
cover daily rollups alongside hourly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
